text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Ines Fujin engaged in some lively
conversation with her friends.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yep, I recommend starting off with sales or
catering! This magazine here lists a bunch of open
positions...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Wow, there are so many!
Are there any that catch your eye, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. They all look rather inviting, but it's a little
difficult to envision what the role entails from the
description alone...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Howdy, howdy! These two were
asking me for advice on part-time jobs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I figured a part-time job would make for
some sweet work experience! That's why I was
asking Ines what kind of jobs are out there.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So, getting back on topic, I recommend a
position at a convenience shop or as a delivery
driver—a lotta-lot of those places are eager to
hire Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense—plus you could get a sweet
workout carrying stuff around!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I see... So, what exactly would this job involve, then?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You put on a mascot costume for that one. And
you get to play with kids! I had so much fun doing
that!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And that's not the only fun experience I've had. I
helped out with a magic show once, and did some
live picture book readings, too. So many
memories!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
What else... Oh, there was that one time I helped
excavate some ruins.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ruins?! Wait, do part-time jobs like that actually exist?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Only if you know where to look—they don't
usually advertise in magazines like these! Oh,
another job you can get is selling lunch boxes at a
baseball stadium—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A b-baseball stadium?! They have part-time jobs
at baseball stadiums?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Man, this is wild. ...I mean, it's pretty amazing
that there are so many different job openings
crammed into this one magazine, sure...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But what's really remarkable is that you seem to
have tried almost all of them, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, well, when it comes to part-time jobs, I've
gotcha covered! Anyway... Hm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin turns her gaze to a passing Umamusume
who's glancing off to the side while carrying a tray
piled high with desserts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as the peril of the situation is beginning to
dawn on me, her foot slips, and—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Watch out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone winces, anticipating the inevitable mess
of ruined pastries on the ground. ...However.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swoosh!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Phew. Good thing I caught all those desserts!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
When you're holding a tray, try stabilizing it with
your fingers instead of your palms! Oh, and try
not to get distracted!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you so much... I'm so sorry about this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: How did you do that?! You went whoosh through the air and caught every single dessert!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'd done that before at a part-time gig!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That doesn't explain anything!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Well, I wasn't working as a ninja or
anything—it's just a hack I picked up from a diner
job.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin laughs off her incredible feat, but it
looks like her long work history is paying off in
various ways.
choice_data_list: It's like there's nothing you can't do.
It's like there's nothing you can't do.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin laughs off her incredible feat, but it
looks like her long work history is paying off in
various ways.
choice_data_list: It's like there's nothing you can't do.
It's like there's nothing you can't do.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I guess. ♪ But I'm just getting started. I mean,
there are still so many professions out there for
me to try!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
There are tuna shoal experts, people who
research soil to make the best rice, artists who
can make stunning pictures using just a few
colored pencils...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Seeing pros like those makes me realize there's a
lot I can't do! It's a big world out there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...I don't know whether you're really
overambitious or I'm just massively lacking in
work experience.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I believe we've somehow transitioned from
part-time work to full-fledged vocations...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I suspect her scope is a little overblown, I'm
reminded of just how talented Ines Fujin really is.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks for the compliment! You know, I do
all this because I want to, so it's kinda weird
hearing you say that.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But now I really want to focus on striking a good
balance between my training and my work!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Hmm. I wonder if all that part-time work is the
secret to Ines's strength.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This all goes to show just how beneficial part-time
jobs are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I feel like these two are missing the point a little...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer! I'm counting on you to keep
supporting me! ♪ I mean, I do rely on you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I come away from the experience feeling like Ines
Fujin and I really do have a strong bond.
